title: Setup
body:
Start the MCP server in a separate terminal first:

```
Terminal 1:  make serve         # mcpkit-Go fixture on :3101
Terminal 2:  make demo          # this walkthrough (--tui for interactive TUI)
```

Any MCP host can connect to the running server (Claude Desktop, VS Code, MCPJam, basic-host). The walkthrough below acts as a scripted host that issues the protocol calls directly through `*mcpkit/client.Client` — no LLM, no browser. The same calls drive the iframe when you run `make demo-app EXAMPLE=basic-vue` in basic-host (see the [centralized guide](../README.md#other-ways-to-test-a-fixture)).

title: Connect to the fixture
output: connected to Basic MCP App Server (Preact) 1.0.0

title: tools/list — verify get-time + its UI resource
tools/call get-time — capture the ISO 8601 timestamp
resources/read on ui://get-time/mcp-app.html

title: Where to look in the code
body:
- `main.go` — fixture is ~60 lines: one typed tool, one paired UI resource, CORS for browser hosts.
- `walkthrough.go` — this file. Each step's curl + Go recipe is the canonical wire reproduction.
- `../README.md` — narrative + screenshots + the centralized [Other ways to test a fixture](../README.md#other-ways-to-test-a-fixture) guide.
